name: Silverco Mining Ltd.
description: Silverco Mining is a growing silver producer focused on Mexico, anchored by two advanced 100%-owned assets: the producing La Negra Mine in Querétaro and the past-producing Cusi Silver Complex in Chihuahua. Together, these assets position the company to target 10 million silver-equivalent ounces of annual production within the next three years. Founded and led by experienced mining entrepreneurs and backed by strategic investors, the company is well-positioned to unlock the full potential of these historic assets while leveraging its permitted processing facilities to drive high-margin, long-term growth in the silver sector.
